l10n.a11yShowSolution: Show the solution. The task will be marked with its correct solution.
l10n.a11yRetry: Retry the task. Reset all responses and start the task over again.

choices.question: Why is post-training needed after pre-training?
answers: Because base models are powerful but may not behave like reliable assistants
Because post-training only makes models faster

choices.question: What is the main goal of SFT?
answers: To make the model imitate high-quality assistant behavior
To reduce the size of the model
To remove all errors from outputs

choices.question: Which statement is true about conversation roles?
answers: Role formatting helps organize one token sequence into different behavior patterns
User and assistant roles are separate neural networks
Role formatting is irrelevant after pre-training
System prompts only affect the interface, not model behavior

choices.question: Why mix human and synthetic data in post-training?
answers: To scale training while maintaining quality control
To make the model forget pre-training
To eliminate the need for prompts
